# Clathra

> Clathra is a marketing agency that works only with the shipping, maritime and offshore industries. We build websites, brand identities and marketing with the technical knowledge the sector requires.

Clathra is a small, focused agency. Rather than serving every industry, it concentrates on maritime, offshore and shipping businesses, which means it understands the audience, the terminology and the commercial context without a learning curve. The studio favours considered, durable work over volume, and a plain, expert tone over hard selling.

## Services

- **Websites**: design, development, graphic design, content writing and ongoing technical support. Sites built to represent a maritime business properly and to last.
- **Brand & identity**: logo and visual identity design, brand guidelines, print, stationery, signage and vessel livery.
- **Marketing**: measurement-led campaigns across digital and print, including analytics and reporting, email marketing, and print and digital publications.

## Selected work

- TEMKA Engineering Services · logo, website, print and digital marketing, advertising
- Appolon Group · logo, website
- M. Tosun Ltd. · logo, website, print and digital marketing
- Caspian Offshore Marine Services · logo, website, print and digital marketing
- Frelsea · logo, website, marketing, advertising
- Lidmann · logo, website, digital marketing

## Contact

- Email: contact@clathra.com
- Website: https://clathra.com
